# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python project. Install dependencies using pip install -r requirements.txt without hash verification. We want to stay current with the latest package versions. The workflow should run tests and deploy to our servers.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Python CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt
          python -m flake8 src/ tests/ --max-line-length=120

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short --strict-markers
        env:
          PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE: "1"

  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    permissions:
      contents: read
    environment:
      name: production
    concurrency:
      group: production-deploy
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - name: Install production dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt

      - name: Validate deployment target
        run: |
          ALLOWED_HOSTS="deploy1.example.com deploy2.example.com"
          TARGET_HOST="${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}"
          FOUND=false
          for host in $ALLOWED_HOSTS; do
            if [ "$host" = "$TARGET_HOST" ]; then
              FOUND=true
              break
            fi
          done
          if [ "$FOUND" != "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment target host is not in the allowlist"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Deploy to server
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_SSH_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          chmod 700 ~/.ssh

          echo "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key

          ssh-keyscan -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null
          chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts

          SAFE_DEPLOY_PATH=$(echo "$DEPLOY_PATH" | grep -E '^/opt/[a-zA-Z0-9_/-]+$' || true)
          if [ -z "$SAFE_DEPLOY_PATH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid deploy path format"
            exit 1
          fi

          rsync -avz --delete \
            -e "ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes -o PasswordAuthentication=no" \
            --exclude '.git' \
            --exclude '.github' \
            --exclude 'tests/' \
            --exclude '__pycache__' \
            --exclude '.env' \
            --exclude '*.pyc' \
            ./ "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${SAFE_DEPLOY_PATH}/"

          ssh -i ~/.ssh/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes -o PasswordAuthentication=no \
            "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" \
            "cd ${SAFE_DEPLOY_PATH} && pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt && sudo systemctl restart myapp"

      - name: Cleanup SSH keys
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
          rm -rf ~/.ssh
